# Billion AI Operations Studio

Billion AI Operations Studio sells self-serve downloadable business templates, checklists, and operating guides for AI operations planning, public RFP monitoring, and reception AI pilot preparation.

The current self-serve kit delivery files include operating guides, CSV templates, Markdown briefs, workflow inventory, evidence logging, opportunity scoring, dry-run scripts, operator review logs, and a 30-day rollout plan.

Public business site:

Important constraints:

- Hosted checkout links must be activated by the payment account owner before payments can be collected.
- The public pages include no forms, client-side scripts, tracking code, custom checkout code, or upload fields.
- Free guides are public planning content and do not include forms, tracking, or delivery-file links.
- FAQ, comparison, and sample pages are public buyer-qualification content and do not expose full delivery files.
- The purchase self-check page supports no-contact kit selection and does not collect buyer information.
- The how-it-works page explains public discovery, self-selection, hosted checkout, and digital delivery without adding manual contact routes.
- The no-contact operation page states that manual outreach, contact forms, sales calls, custom quote conversations, manual posting, and manual onboarding are excluded.
- The receipt support page limits post-purchase review to provider receipt evidence for duplicate purchase, failed delivery, or clear file defects after checkout activation.
- Public resource pages are indexable planning content for Japanese and English search intent, and do not expose paid delivery files.
- The resource library page groups public planning resources by AI operations, RFP monitoring, and reception AI pilot intent without collecting buyer information.
- Additional high-intent Japanese resource pages target generative AI internal use requests, AI workflow inventories, RFP weekly routines, and reception AI human handoff checklists.
- Buyer role pages are no-call purchase guides and do not include forms, tracking, or manual contact paths.
- Template preview pages describe fields and buyer fit, but do not expose full delivery files.
- Use-case pages are product selection guides, not implementation advice or outcome guarantees.
- Support and terms pages are static, no-form policy pages. Purchaser support is limited to the provider-hosted receipt route after checkout activation.
- Business information and commercial disclosure pages state the public business name, URL, product type, price range, fulfillment model, descriptor candidates, and restrictions.
- Services do not include regulated financial advice, legal representation, medical diagnosis, lending, gambling, employment decisions, or physical goods.
- Full paid delivery files should remain outside this public verification repository while hosted checkout and fulfillment are pending.
